div.head: The Chargé in Salvador (Arnold) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
San Salvador, September 14, 1920—2 p.m.
[Received September 15—2:11 a.m.]

div.p: 32. Department’s telegram 17, September 13th, 6 p.m. Proposed conference will not be held September 15th. Guatemala, Honduras, Costa Rica and Salvador have agreed to place in the hands of the Central American International Bureau in Guatemala, the formation of the program of the Conference as well as the fixing of the date and place of the proposed conference. Nicaragua’s agreement still lacking.
